title: sedum album subsp. clusianum
intro: Sedum album subsp. clusianum, also known as White Sedum or Clusius's Sedum, is a subspecies of the perennial succulent plant Sedum album. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sedum album subsp. clusianum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
